text.title: Strangler-Fig Migration Playbook (Vendor Delivery) Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply Strangler-Fig Migration Playbook (Vendor Delivery) end-to-end. Each step has named input, action, and output. Decision gates reference rules from `01-core-rules.xml`.

step.name: inventory-and-score
step.action: Build the monolith_inventory CSV (route_or_job_name, traffic_rps, error_rate_baseline, p99_latency_ms_baseline). Run `scripts/score-slices.py` to score each on coupling_depth, traffic_risk, business_priority.

step.name: pick-first-3-slices
step.action: Select first 3 slices where coupling_depth â‰¤2 AND traffic_risk â‰¤3 AND business_priority â‰Ą3. Reject any first slice with coupling_depth â‰Ą4 (r1).

step.name: install-rails
step.input: First slice selection + routing facade tech (Envoy/nginx/Kong)
step.action: Deploy routing facade in front of monolith; configure observability for parity comparison; build and test the kill-switch revert path (â‰¤5 min).
step.output: Routing facade + observability live; kill-switch tested

step.name: cutover-with-dual-write
step.action: Enable dual-write to legacy and new during the burn-in window (r4). Shift traffic 1%â†’10%â†’50%â†’100% gated on parity error rate Â±10% (r2).

step.name: burn-in-7d-and-shadow-read
step.action: Run â‰Ą168 hours at full traffic with error_rate_delta â‰¤10% and p99_latency_delta â‰¤10%. Switch to single-write on new + shadow-read on legacy for â‰Ą7 more days.

step.name: retire-and-handoff
step.action: Retire legacy code path; generate runbook for in-house team; collect exit_criteria_signoff with all three flags true and client_architect_signature_date populated (r5).

section.title: Decision gates
section.p: Between steps, consult `content/06-decision-tree.xml` if the observed signal does not match expected output. The decision tree always terminates at a rule id from `01-core-rules.xml` or at `skip-this-methodology`.
